question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 20.00% on 2026-04-11 for the Metaculus question "Will the Iranian government lose power before 2027?"?
summary: This meta-prediction asks whether the Metaculus CP for "Will the Iranian government lose power before 2027?" will be strictly above 20% on April 11. The CP is currently exactly at 20.00% with a strong, consistent downward trend (-7.5, -9.5, -8.0 pts/week for 3 consecutive weeks). The Iranian regime has survived a month of US/Israel military strikes: Pezeshkian remains president, the Guardian Council is intact, the IRGC has consolidated power, and the constitution still refers to the Islamic Republic. Ceasefire negotiations are progressing (US 15-point plan, Iran 5-point counter), with a potential ceasefire window of Mar 31 - Apr 7. US intelligence assesses regime change as improbable. The primary upside risk is war escalation (ground invasion, energy strike deadline April 6), which could spike CP. However, the most likely paths — ceasefire or continued regime resilience under bombing — both push CP further below 20%. My estimate of ~32% reflects the strong downward momentum offset by genuine tail risks from an active war.

factors.description: Strong consistent downward CP trend: -7.5, -9.5, -8.0 pts/week for 3 consecutive weeks, now at exactly 20% threshold
Fundamentals favor continued decline: regime survived month of bombing, Pezeshkian still president, Guardian Council intact, constitution unchanged, IRGC consolidated power
Ceasefire negotiations progressing: US 15-point plan, Iran 5-point counter, Pakistan/Turkey/Egypt mediation, potential ceasefire Mar 31 - Apr 7
US intelligence and analysts assess regime change as improbable; US plan explicitly excludes regime change
Active war creates genuine tail risk of escalation: potential ground invasion, Pentagon considering 10k troops, energy strike deadline April 6
CP at exact threshold - any small fluctuation or dramatic event could push above; 205 forecasters means some stochastic volatility
Trump 'regime change' rhetoric could influence some forecasters upward, even though criteria not actually met

reasoning:
**Forecast: 0.32 (32% probability that CP will be above 20% on April 11)**

Key reasoning:

- **Strong downward trend**: CP dropped consistently at ~8 pts/week for 3 straight weeks (45% → 37.5% → 28% → 20%), now sitting exactly at the threshold
- **Regime survived**: Despite a month of US/Israel bombing that killed Khamenei, the Islamic Republic persists — Mojtaba Khamenei replaced his father, Pezeshkian is still president, Guardian Council still functions, constitution unchanged
- **Ceasefire talks progressing**: US 15-point plan (which explicitly excludes regime change) was shared; Iran counter-proposed; mediation active through Pakistan/Turkey/Egypt; possible ceasefire window Mar 31 - Apr 7
- **Upside risk from active war**: Ground invasion possibility, energy strike deadline April 6, Pentagon considering 10k troop deployment — these could reverse the CP trend if ceasefire talks collapse
- **Net assessment**: ~65-70% chance the downward trend continues (CP → 12-18%), ~25-30% chance war dynamics push CP modestly above 20%, ~5% chance of dramatic escalation pushing CP well above 20%
sources_consulted: [(Metaculus) Will the Iranian government lose power before 2027?](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/38770)
resolution_criteria: This question will resolve based on the community prediction of the Metaculus question found [here](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/38770) (i.e. the 'target question'). If the community prediction of the target question on 2026-04-11 12:20:36 is higher than 20.00%, this question will resolve to 'Yes'. If it is lower or equal to 20.00%, this question will resolve to 'No'. If the target question has already resolved before this question opens, then this question will be annulled. If the target question resolves after this question opens, but before 2026-04-11 12:20:36, then this question will resolve to the same value as the target question.
